prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-USBFLASHLIGHT-BLACK-FL3658R10 Product Type: FLASHLIGHT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Black Compact 500 Lumens LED Adjustable Flashlight with Rechargeable USB Battery, 4.5 Inch Description: Featuring a concealed and built-in USB charger at the bottom of this ASR Outdoor flashlight, one can easily recharge the black, adjustable focus flashlight in any USB port or with a USB adapter at home, at work or even in the car on the way to your campsite.

In addition to having a unique built-in USB charger, this ASR Outdoor LED rechargeable flashlight also has some other useful features-read on. The first we'll mention is the adjustable light beam size; by simply pushing and pulling the flashlight head in and out, the projected beam of light will easily adjust, allowing you to zoom in or out between x1, x25, x50, x100 or x200 (this flashlight features 500 Lumens of brightness and a 10W bulb).

Secondly, the compact LED flashlight comes with three stages or modes: full power, half power and flashing or strobe; full power will last three hours, half power will last six hours and lastly, the strobe light will also last up to six hours. And lastly, this EDC gear flashlight also comes with a handy lanyard wrist strap, to help secure the tool around your wrist when in use; or, when not in use, it can attach to a backpack, inner pocket, work bag and more via carabiner or clip, making it easy to locate and store.

Whether you're camping, backpacking, trekking, hiking or employing this USB direct charge flashlight for work, tactical or field use, you'll never have to worry about batteries again. Search Terms: USB rechargeable black compact LED flashlight tactical camping backpacking climbing hunting trekking survival kit hiking gear supplies equipment bug out bag gadgets car emergency prepper tools first aid police lanyard spy fishing Features: - RECHARGEABLE FLASHLIGHT VIA USB: Never worry about batteries again! Featuring a concealed and built-in USB charger at the bottom of the flashlight, easily recharge this ASR Outdoor adjustable LED flashlight in any USB port or with a USB adapter at home, at work or even in the car on the way to your campsite - ADJUSTABLE LIGHT BEAM SIZE: By simply pushing and pulling the flashlight head in and out, the beam of LED light will easily adjust depending on the intended or needed use; zoom in or out between x1, x25, x50, x100 or x200; this flashlight features 500 Lumens of brightness and a 10W bulb - 3 STAGE SWITCH MODES: In addition to the light beam focus head, this rechargeable flashlight features three light modes including full power, half power and flashing or strobe; full power will last three hours, half power will last six hours and lastly, the strobe light will also last up to six hours - HANDY WRIST STRAP: Featuring a useful and handy wrist strap, secure the compact, LED tactical flashlight around your wrist when in use; when not employed, use the strap to attach to a backpack, inner pocket, work bag and more via carabiner or clip making it easy to locate and store - SPECIFICATIONS: Length: 4.5 inches; Rechargeable Battery: 1200 MAH; Color: Black; Full Charge: 1.5 hours; Grey lanyard wrist strap included === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor Black Compact 500 Lumens USB Rechargeable Flashlight
